markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, review initial drafts, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Calibration:** The initial draft needs a key tone adjustment to acknowledge that security is a continuous journey, not a binary "achieved" state.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Data & Tools:** The Looker dashboard is live, consolidating GA4 & GSC data. Scrunch shows a high 10% citation rate (vs. a 2–3% average), but this is based on a small, potentially biased prompt set.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** SpecterOps will provide feedback on the content calendar and draft, explain GA4 conversions, schedule a product deep-dive, and share a detailed brand guide.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration

  - [**Initial Draft:** A broad topic ("Zero Trust vs. Least Privilege") was chosen to test tone and style.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**Required Tone Adjustment:** The draft must convey empathy by acknowledging that security is a continuous journey, not a binary "achieved" state.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Feedback Process:** Use Notion comments (`@Aida`) for specific feedback on the draft and content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Week 1:** 3 blogs](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Week 2:** 5 blogs](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

### Data & Performance Tracking

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Consolidates GA4 and GSC data into a 7-page report.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Averages \~50%, which is typical.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Traffic:** Report is broken; Aida will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**GA4 Conversions:** Meshach will provide context on events and their relative importance.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic is growing, with ChatGPT as the primary source.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [**Scrunch Platform:** Tracks LLM visibility against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [**Citation Rate:** 10% (vs. a 2–3% average).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Context:** This rate is based on a small, Scrunch-generated prompt set and will change as more prompts are added.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Action:** SpecterOps can provide more prompts to track.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

### Product & Brand Alignment

  - [**Product Deep-Dive:** A product deep-dive is needed for content context.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [**Presenter:** Jonathan Parfait (SE) is the best choice, as their customer-facing experience provides the most relevant context for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [**Attendees:** Jonathan Parfait (SpecterOps) and Erik O'Brien (GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**Image Generation:** GrowthX will create GPT-generated images for blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [**Process:** Requires a brand guide (colors, fonts, assets) to ensure brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [**Action:** Ric will share a detailed brand standard guide.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**SpecterOps Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the initial blog draft and content calendar in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Explain GA4 conversion events and their relative importance (Owner: Meshach).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Schedule the product deep-dive with Jonathan Parfait and Erik O'Brien (Owner: Meshach).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [Share the detailed brand standard guide (Owner: Ric).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [Investigate the broken non-branded traffic report in Looker (Owner: Aida).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Create mockups of GPT-generated images using the new brand guide (Owner: Katya).](https://fathom.video/share/4nLAscxBGf3zzAkR98fJHD-VVzy-VQSW?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
